greeting.speaker: Ruth
greeting.text: Cid. Good lord. Come inside. You look like you've seen a ghost.

choices.text: I'm okay Ruth. Just a lot on my mind.
I need to talk to someone.

lot_on_mind.speaker: Ruth
lot_on_mind.text: Then put it somewhere. Talk to me.

need_to_talk.speaker: Ruth
need_to_talk.text: Then talk. I'm not going anywhere.

leaving.speaker: Ruth
leaving.text: Tonight. What do you mean tonight?

ruth_listens.speaker: Ruth
ruth_listens.text: That man who came through today. He said something to you didn't he.

choices.text: He did. I don't understand all of it.
I'm not sure what's real right now Ruth.

dont_understand.speaker: Ruth
dont_understand.text: That's alright. You don't always have to understand. You just have to decide.

how_know.speaker: Ruth
how_know.text: Because I've seen that look before. On someone else. A long time ago. They didn't stay either.

not_real.speaker: Ruth
not_real.text: I'm real. This kitchen is real. And you've been a good person every day you've been here. That's real.

ruth_anchor.speaker: Ruth
ruth_anchor.text: You have a life here Cid. It might not be what you came from, but it's yours.

choices.text: I know. And that's why this is hard.
I think I have to go.

hard.speaker: Ruth
hard.text: The hard things usually are. That's how you know they matter.

enough.speaker: Ruth
enough.text: It is enough. More than enough. You stay. You let whatever this is pass.

have_to_go.speaker: Ruth
have_to_go.text: Then go. But you take this with you.

ruth_gift.speaker: Ruth
ruth_gift.text: You're loved here Cid. Whatever they tell you you are. You remember that first.

ruth_farewell_branch.speaker: Ruth
ruth_farewell_branch.text: Whatever you decide. You come back here for breakfast. Promise me.

farewell.speaker: Ruth
farewell.text: Go on now. I'll keep the light on.

greeting_return.speaker: Ruth
greeting_return.text: Light's still on. Always will be.
